titleStmt.title: SII 8.316: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 316. (A.R. No. 42 of 1903). ON A PILLAR IN THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kāppu niṟaipunal māppap
pāḷamum kāvalampuricai
mevilipaṅkamum viḷaippai
ntuṟuṭai vaḷaippain
tūṟum titamaātolviṉai
mātamaliṅkamum kalāmu
tir kaṭuntiṟal Ilāmutirte
camum tenakkavārpoḻil
mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟ kā
vaṟ karumuraṭkāṭāramum māp
porutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa
kopparākecaripanmarāna U
ṭaiyār śrīrājentracoḻa
devaṟkku yāṇṭu Irupattumun
ṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻama
ṇṭalattu tirumuṉaippā
ṭi Ānmurnāṭṭu Ātirājama
ṅkalliyapurattu Uṭaiyār
tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiyār kaliyu
kacaṇṭeśvararkku Ittevar
tevatānam paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu Ā
nāṅkūrnāṭṭu kāṭṭuppākkattu Ū
rom Oṭṭi nilam viṟṟu cilāle
kai ceytukuṭutta paricāvatu . pe
runtaram coḻamaṇṭalattu Aru
moḻitevavaḷanāṭṭup puliyūrnā
ṭṭu vāñciyūr vāñciyūr kiḻavan
naārāyaṇan rājarājan Uṭaiyār
tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiya mahaādevar
kku Ucciyampotu santiyil cār
ttiAruḷa nāḷ Onṟiṉukku tum
paippūt tiruppaḷḷittāmam pa
takkāka cantirātittavaṟ celuttu
m nilanivantamāka Ivvūrk kuṭip
paṟṟātu Ūrppotuvāyk kiṭan
ta nilan tiruttikkoḷḷa Ivvūr nā
ṅkaḷ viṟṟa nilattukku tenpārkkel
lai vaḻipokikaṇṇāṟum maṭamānka
ṇṇāṟum vaṭakkunokki Uṟṟa El
laikku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai
Ānāṅkūr Ellaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai Ikkāṭṭuppākkattuc
cuḷaimeṭṭukkum Ivvūrk kuṭiirukkaiyi
n teṟkil mañcaḷtoṭṭamenṟu
perkūvivarum nilattukku teṟkum kiḻ
pāṟkellai Ivvūril teṟkil ma
ntakuṭṭattukku meṟkum Innānke
llaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam patina
ṟucāṇkollāl nūṟukuḻi koṇ
ṭatu Orumāvāka nilam Araiyey nānmā
varai Araikkāṇik kiḻkkālum Itanu
kke nilamāka viṟṟa Eṅkaḷūriṟ kiḻaiEn
talin kiḻnilattil tenpārkkellai tac
canpaṭṭikkum piṭāripaṭṭikkum vaṭakku me
lpārkkellai Entalukkuk kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai Entalilninṟumki
ḻakkunokki pona Oḻukkaikkut te
ṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai Iraiṅkaṇṇā
ṟṟu melaivarampukku meṟkum naṭuvupaṭṭa
nilam mukkāle mukkāṇiyum Āka nila
m Onṟaraiyey kāṇi Araikkāṇik ki
ḻkkālum viṟṟukkuṭuttuk
koṇṭatukku .
The portion containing the beginning of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 8.316 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
